title: Terminal Workflow
definition: The sequence of terminal commands used for specific tasks, such as automated CID minting and GitHub updates in the context of the CADMIES project.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A set of instructions to be executed in a terminal (command line), like copying files or running scripts, to complete tasks related to the CADMIES project.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A series of commands and scripts used to manage specific aspects of the CADMIES project within the terminal environment, such as automating CID minting and updating GitHub.
difficulty_levels.expert: An optimized set of terminal commands for handling repetitive tasks in the CADMIES project, increasing efficiency and consistency.

extra_fields.insight: The streamlined sequence of terminal commands that powers many operations within the CADMIES system, from automating CID minting to updating GitHub repositories.
